message:
Replace remaining rusqlite params! calls with fparams! in FrankenStorage

Systematic migration of all query_row_map, execute_params, and
query_map_collect call sites from rusqlite's params![] macro to the
new fparams![] macro that builds frankensqlite ParamValue slices.
This eliminates the name conflict between the two parameter macros
and ensures all FrankenStorage methods use the correct parameter type.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
